title: Swizzels Love Hearts 18cm (7-Inch) Baby Bunny Rabbit ‘SOMEBUNNY LOVES YOU’ Plush Soft Toy
features: Brighten up somebody’s day with this adorable Swizzels Love Hearts Baby Bunny Rabbit plush soft toy
Features the message ‘SOMEBUNNY LOVES YOU’ embroidered onto a Swizzels Love Hearts sweet
This plush soft toy has been produced using the highest quality and softest fabrics and measures approximately 18cm in height.
Officially licensed Swizzels Love Hearts soft toy.
description: Product Description Hop to it and help spread plenty of love and positivity with this adorable Swizzels Love Hearts Baby Bunny Rabbit and let people special to you know that “SOMEBUNNY LOVES YOU” and always will. Anyone lucky enough to receive this adorable Swizzels Love Hearts Baby Bunny Rabbit plush soft toy that is holding a bright yellow Love Hearts sweet with the text ‘Somebunny Loves You’ embroidered inside of it, is sure to absolutely love it...and have a huge smile on their face. This adorable Swizzels Love Hearts Baby Bunny Rabbit plush soft toy has been produced using luxury fabrics, the softest stuffing and is finished with high-quality detailing with her gorgeous soft pink fur, floppy ears and cute little pink nose. This Swizzels Love Hearts Baby Bunny Rabbit plush soft toy has been specially made to make sure they give the best hugs and puts smiles on faces of anyone that cuddles up with it. The Swizzels Love Hearts soft toy collection have been specially designed to help spread positivity and kindness with their fun, sentimental messages and adorable characters that fans of all ages can love and enjoy. This soft toy measures approximately 18cm in height. Officially licensed Swizzels Love Hearts soft toy from Posh Paws. Suitable from birth. Safety Warning Suitable from birth
